text:
(a) The portion of State Highway 21 in Nacogdoches County between its intersection with County Road 511 and its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 95 is designated as the Bob Luman Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Bob Luman Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(37), eff. September 1, 2017.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.111 — Bob Luman Memorial Highway

(a) The portion of State Highway 21 in Nacogdoches County between its intersection with County Road 511 and its intersection with Farm-to-Market Road 95 is designated as the Bob Luman Memorial Highway. The designation is in addition to any other designation.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as the Bob Luman Memorial Highway and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the highway and at appropriate intermediate sites along the highway.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(37), eff. September 1, 2017.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 276 (H.B.598), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.102 (Captain Jesse Billingsley Memorial Loop in Bastrop County) by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 324 (S.B. 1488 ), Sec. 24.001(37), eff. September 1, 2017.
